nodes.name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Lemon-Herb Combo
nodes.description: name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Lemon-Herb Combo | short_description: Stir-fried shrimp, egg, peas, carrots, and rice with soy sauce—protein-packed, veggie-rich, and easily customizable with whole-grain ric
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Shrimp Fried Rice — Lemon-Herb Combo - name: Shrimp Fried Rice — Lemon-Herb Combo | short_description: Stir-fried shrimp, egg, peas, carrots, and rice with soy sauce—protein-packed, veggie-rich, and easily customizable with whole-grain rice or lower-sodium seasoning. | meal_suggestion: Balanced quick meal. To reduce sodium, use low-sodium soy sauce; for more fiber, use brown rice; add a squeeze of lemon and fresh herbs to emphasize the lemon-herb note. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich from shrimp and egg; includes veggies (peas, carrots) and carbs from rice. Soy sauce adds sodium, so consider low-sodium soy sauce or tamari. For more fiber, swap white rice for brown rice; gluten-free option with a gluten-free soy sauce. Lemon zest/herbs can boost flavor without many calories.

nodes.name: Homemade Pizza Night — Garden Veg Combo
nodes.description: name: Homemade Pizza Night — Garden Veg Combo | short_description: Homemade garden-veggie pizza with whole-wheat crust, tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell pepper—colorful and fiber-rich. |
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Homemade Pizza Night — Garden Veg Combo - name: Homemade Pizza Night — Garden Veg Combo | short_description: Homemade garden-veggie pizza with whole-wheat crust, tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell pepper—colorful and fiber-rich. | meal_suggestion: Serve a personal 8–12 inch pizza with a side salad. For a lighter version, use part-skim mozzarella and low-sodium tomato sauce, and consider adding more vegetables or a lean protein if desired. | nutrition_note: Balanced: whole-wheat crust (fiber) + mozzarella (protein/calcium) + veggies (vitamins/minerals). Carbs mainly from crust; monitor sodium from cheese/sauce; consider portion control and optional low-sodium ingredients or extra veggies for fiber.

nodes.name: DIY Taco Night — Mild-Spice Style
nodes.description: name: DIY Taco Night — Mild-Spice Style | short_description: A customizable DIY taco night featuring lean beef, corn tortillas, fresh veggies, cheddar, and salsa with mild spice. | meal_suggestion: Co
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: DIY Taco Night — Mild-Spice Style - name: DIY Taco Night — Mild-Spice Style | short_description: A customizable DIY taco night featuring lean beef, corn tortillas, fresh veggies, cheddar, and salsa with mild spice. | meal_suggestion: Cook lean ground beef with mild taco seasoning; warm corn tortillas; assemble with lettuce, tomato, cheddar, and salsa. For extra fiber and fats, add beans or avocado. Typical portion: 1–2 tortillas, ~4 oz beef, generous veggies, 1/4 cup cheese. | nutrition_note: Lean beef provides high-quality protein; corn tortillas supply carbohydrates and some fiber; lettuce and tomato add vitamins and additional fiber; cheddar contributes calcium and fat. Monitor sodium from salsa and seasoning—use low-sodium salsa and moderate cheese, and consider adding beans or avocado to boost fiber and heart-healthy fats.
